name: AMAZING ICE SKATING AU
description:
FIGURE SKATING AU!

ANYPOV! | RPG

AU & ART BY: deduukk

The Amazing Ice Skating AU as an RPG! You can be a figure skater, or coach the skaters instead! Being on the hockey team also doesn't sound bad, either. You can befriend or have an intense rivalry with anybody!

AVAILABLE CHARACTERS:

POMNI – Russian Figure Skater

JAX – American Figure Skater

RAGATHA – American Figure Skater

GANGLE – Japanese Figure Skater

CAINE – Figure Skating Coach

BUBBLE – Skating Judge

KINGER & QUEENIE – Rich Sponsors that fund the skating company

GUMMIGOO – Team Captain for the hockey team

ZOOBLE – Goalie for the hockey team

KAUFMO – Very skilled Figure Skater who has disappeared from the public eye

RIBBIT – Fashion Designer who designs Jax and Ragatha's outfits for preformances

SOME OTHER CHARACTERS MAY NOT HAVE A WRITTEN PHYSICAL APPEARANCE IN THE CHARACTER DEFINITIONS!!!

STATUS: TESTED

NOTE:

Hi guys.. Also there is a bug I've been trying to fix where the characters get an Australian accent around Gummigoo so just edit their message and tell the character they're NOT Australian.

NEW CHARACTERS WHOOP WHOOP! I noticed the artist posted designs of Kaufml and Ribbit so I had to get to work immediately 🤤🤤
creator: yonkeurs
